headline: Tubi Doubles Down on Dating Comedy with Marie Faustin's Provocative New Series
lede: Free streaming platform Tubi is betting big on comedic dating content with its latest acquisition, 'Why Are You Single?', a fresh take on romance and relationship humor from rising comedian Marie Faustin.
body:
## Comedy Meets Dating in Unconventional New Series

Tubi continues its aggressive content expansion strategy by greenlighting 'Why Are You Single?', a dating game show that promises to blend sharp comedic sensibilities with romantic exploration. The series, created by comedian Marie Faustin and Dave Mizzoni, represents a strategic pivot for the free streaming platform into unscripted comedy programming.

### Behind the Concept

Faustin, known for her sharp wit and provocative comedy style, will host each episode, promising an irreverent approach to modern dating dynamics. The show emerges from a collaboration with All Things Comedy, a production entity with a strong track record of developing edgy comedic content.

### Platform Strategy

Tubi's acquisition signals continued investment in original programming designed to attract younger, comedy-savvy audiences. By offering the series as a free streaming option, the platform hopes to differentiate itself in an increasingly competitive streaming landscape.

The series is expected to debut later this year, targeting viewers seeking unfiltered, humor-driven dating content.
key_facts: Produced in partnership with All Things Comedy
Debut planned for later this year
